description: Algebraic trajectory and movement calculations with fixed physics assumptions

fieldDimensions.description: All dimensions in METERS. Boundary 70m from center. Pitch length 20.12m (22 yards), striker 10.06m (11 yards) from center

aerial.description: Fixed 45-degree launch angle for maximum range calculation

grounded.description: Direct straight-line trajectory with algebraic deceleration

ballMovement.description: Ultra-simplified physics: gravity=10 m/s², constant speed movement, no deceleration

fielderMovement.description: Basic fielder movement speed (will use throw_speed attribute when available)

interceptionFormula.description: Direct algebraic interception for grounded shots

aerialInterception.description: Bounce point analysis for aerial shots

directionSelection.description: Angular gap analysis for optimal shot placement

boundaryCache.description: Pre-calculated boundary distances for all 360 degrees from striker position
